rationale: Diff adds .agents/skills/testing-ccc-frontend/SKILL.md as a new file with mode 100644 and git blob hash e69de29 (the canonical empty-blob hash), so the file is created but contains zero bytes. The PR title and body explicitly claim the file documents auth bypass, key routes, testing tips, and known limitations when testing without a backend. None of that content exists in the diff; the only change is the creation of an empty markdown file, so the stated goal is not accomplished.
